headline: Why The Narrative Around Oddity Tech (ODD) Is Shifting After Guidance Reset And Ad Concerns
summary: The model fair value for Oddity Tech sits at US$17.33 per share, with no change to the core price target despite a higher 10.89% discount rate in the latest update. That steadiness on fair value comes as several firms turn more cautious after guidance resets, weaker Q1 expectations, and concerns around rising customer acquisition costs tied to a key advertising partner. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting views and what to watch as the story continues to develop. Stay...

headline: How The SLB (SLB) Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Valuation And Risks
summary: SLB's implied fair value estimate has shifted from US$60.33 to US$61.39 per share, a modest change that still matters if you are tracking valuation closely. That move is landing at the same time as a wave of upward price target revisions from firms such as Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan, following fresh company guidance and new macro headlines. Read on to see how this evolving analyst narrative might shape the way you follow SLB from here. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full...

headline: Umicore - Transparency notification by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc.
summary: Transparency notification byThe Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. In accordance with article 14, § 1 of the law of 2 May 2007 on the disclosure of major holdings, Umicore was recently notified by The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. that it has crossed the legal threshold of 3% for the direct voting rights downwards and the legal threshold of 3% for the equivalent financial instruments upwards on 7 May 2026.
